name: Honolulu Skewer House
tagline: DIY Chinese skewer grilling on Kapahulu — rotating tabletop machines, lamb skewers, and a late-night vibe unlike anything else on Oahu.
mustOrder: lamb skewers — order double, cumin-spiced and smoky
talkStory: A unique concept on Oahu — Chinese-style BBQ skewers that you grill yourself on rotating mechanical skewer machines built into each table. The lamb skewers dusted with cumin and chili are the star — order at least double what you think you need. The vibe is late-night and communal, popular with UH students and young locals. Reservations recommended because the space is small and it fills up fast. Open 5pm-11pm. Nothing else like it on the island.
